subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the Himalaya at sea, 1913-06-13
subcodes.first_line: How poor are they [labourers on ship], and how hard they toil! The presidents of factories and other operations must allocate a share [of the profits] for the workers in their companies
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه قدر فقیرند و چگونه زحمت میکشند رؤسای اداره‌ها و کارخانه‌جات باید بجهت مزدوران در کمپانیها
subcodes.subjects: @labor and management; labor relations; profit sharing, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @wealth inequality and its moderation
